problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
